sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1121" key="a)dagmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδαγμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> sub <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀδαγμός</foreign>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀδακτῶ</foreign>.</entryFree>
